instructions:
Compatible for use with Turn: A Slice of Life, Supernatural Roleplaying Game of Shapeshifters in Small Towns, by Beau Jágr Sheldon/Thoughty. Turn is a game about shapeshifters living quietly in a small town, navigating the push and pull between their human and beast natures. The rules are available at https://thoughty.itch.io/turn

Roll20 Character Sheet

• Human and Beast archetype tabs with separate abilities, background text, and goals for 9 human and 9 beast archetypes
• Each sheet self-populates once an archetype is selected from a drop-down menu
• Habit and Instinct stat blocks with Powers and Struggles roll buttons
• Dedicated Turn Die button with result cards and a stress reminder
• Human Stress and Beast Stress tracks
• Town Exposure and Animal Group Exposure tracks with positive and negative radial buttons

How to Use
Select your Human and Beast archetypes from the dropdown menus on each page. Your stat values will populate automatically. Enter your character information, then use the Roll buttons next to each Habit or Instinct to make Powers or Struggles rolls — results appear as plain roll results in the chat window.

Optional Enhancement (requires Roll20 Pro)
An optional API script is available to enhance roll output with illustrated result banner cards, tier labels (Full Success, Partial Success, Miss/Complication), and a dedicated Turn Die card with a stress reminder. Without the API script, all rolls function normally and display standard dice results in chat — no errors or missing functionality.
